message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Operator
boundary "«Boundary» MakerUI" as MakerUI
control "«Control» Maker" as Maker
entity "«Entity» Request" as Request
entity "«Entity» Passport" as Passport

Operator -> MakerUI : 1: Login
MakerUI -> MakerUI : 1.1: Render
MakerUI -> Maker : 1.2: Pass Credentials
Maker -> Maker : 1.2.1: Evaluate

alt user exists
    Maker -> Request : 1.2.2.1: getRequest()
    Request --> Maker : 1.2.2.2: Got requests
    Maker --> MakerUI : 1.3: Return requests
    MakerUI --> Operator : 2: Render requests
else login invalid
    Maker --> MakerUI : 1.3: Login invalid
    MakerUI -x Operator : 2: Print "Invalid login"
end

loop n times
    alt do Print Passport
        Operator -> MakerUI : 3: Print passport
        MakerUI -> Maker : 3.1: Print passport
        ref over Maker, Passport
            Print passsport
        end ref
        Maker --> MakerUI : Printer State
        MakerUI --> Operator : Printed
    else do Edit Passport
        Operator -> MakerUI : 3: Edit Passport
        MakerUI -> Maker : 3.1: Get passport data
        Maker -> Passport : 3.1.1: getPassport()
        Passport --> Maker : 3.1.2: Passport
        Maker --> MakerUI : 3.2: Edit Passport
        MakerUI --> Operator : 4: Password edited
    end
end

@enduml
```
